testcase.name: test_invoice_wa_default

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ('wa_text' in {'doc_type': 'invoice', 'download_url': 'https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/api/public/finance-doc/b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59', 'month': 'July 2026', 'share_token': 'b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59', ...} and 'Invoice for' in '#x1F9FE *PROJEXINO SOLUTIONS*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*Demo Web Build Invoice — July 2026*

Hi Acme Co #x1F44B
Your invoice is ready. Quick summary:

▸ *Invoice No:* PRX-2026-00017
▸ *Service:* Demo Web Build
▸ *Billing Month:* July 2026
▸ *Amount:* INR 100.00

#x1F4E5 *Download PDF*
https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/api/public/finance-doc/b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59

#x1F4B3 *Pay Securely (Bank Transfer / Card)*
https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/pay/invoice/b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Thank you for choosing Projexino! #x1F9E1
_Questions? Just reply to this message._')

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_iter61_whatsapp.py:101: in test_invoice_wa_default assert "wa_text" in d and "Invoice for" in d["wa_text"] E AssertionError: assert ('wa_text' in {'doc_type': 'invoice', 'download_url': 'https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/api/public/finance-doc/b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59', 'month': 'July 2026', 'share_token': 'b32589ad20bf4d6098c4a003daf5af59', ...} and 'Invoice for' in '#x1F9FE *PROJEXINO SOLUTIONS*

Thank you for choosing Projexino! #x1F9E1

testcase.name: test_invoice_wa_receipt

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Receipt for' in '#x1F9FE *PROJEXINO SOLUTIONS*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*Demo Web Build Receipt — July 2026*

Hi Acme Co #x1F44B
Your receipt is ready. Quick summary:

▸ *Billing Month:* July 2026
▸ *Amount:* INR 100.00
▸ *Status:* Paid ✅

_Questions? Just reply to this message._'
